metadata.description: Claude Cowork Bootcamp 2.0 — All session plugins, bonuses, and tools. 6 sessions, 70+ skills.

plugins.name: file-master
plugins.description: Organize, ingest, search, and track files in your Coworker workspace. Session 1 plugin.

plugins.name: content-creator
plugins.description: Write content for any platform in your voice. Newsletters, LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube, Substack Notes. Session 2 plugin.

plugins.name: calendar-ninja
plugins.description: Full calendar operations — meeting prep, post-meeting debrief, deep work blocking, action tracking, follow-up emails. Session 3 plugin.

plugins.name: voice-lab
plugins.description: Train your AI to write like you. Voice DNA, archetypes, vocabulary, tone grid, Voice Template.

plugins.name: repurposer
plugins.description: Extract short-form social content from long-form newsletters.

plugins.name: meeting-to-content
plugins.description: Turn today's meetings into content. Extracts insights, interviews you, drafts in your voice.

plugins.name: follow-up-writer
plugins.description: Draft personalized meeting follow-up emails with action items and next steps.

plugins.name: ai-hunter-v2
plugins.description: Detect and fix AI patterns in your writing. Surgical rewrites with verification.

plugins.name: morning-brief
plugins.description: Daily morning briefing — calendar, email triage, meeting context, deep work windows. Schedule at 7am.

plugins.name: project-kit
plugins.description: One meeting becomes a complete engagement. Transcript extraction, strategy, proposals, decks, project planning, social content.

plugins.name: digital-product
plugins.description: Build a digital product from idea to live sale. Idea finding, validation, outlining, writing, ebook design, landing pages, launch kit.

plugins.name: design-secrets
plugins.description: Your personal design aesthetic baked into Cowork. Upload brand assets, extract your visual identity, apply it to everything.
